bird.summary: The Australian king parrot (Alisterus scapularis) is a species of parrot endemic to eastern Australia ranging from Cooktown in Queensland t…

locations.name: 溫帶雨林
locations.summary: 温带季雨林通称溫帶雨林，是地球上中緯度的高雨量地區的針葉樹或闊葉樹季雨林。它們大多數位於海洋性濕潤氣候區，例如北美洲西北部（自加州西北部至阿拉斯加東南部）、歐洲西北部（英國、愛爾蘭、挪威）、智利南部、澳洲東南部（塔斯曼尼亞省、維多利亞省）…

locations.name: 堪培拉
locations.summary: 坎培拉（英語：Canberra，/ˈkænbərə/），或譯堪培拉，是澳洲首都，同时也是首都领地的首府。堪培拉是澳洲最大的內陸城市，人口46.6萬人（截至2023年6月），在澳洲所有城市裡排名第八。座落於澳大利亚首都领地北端，距離澳洲東岸…

locations.name: 悉尼
locations.summary: 雪梨（英語：Sydney），位於澳洲东南沿海地带，是新南威尔士州的首府，是澳大利亚人口第一多也是人口最稠密的城市。都會區人口5,312,123人（2019）。雪梨人在英語中俗稱「Sydneysider」。 雪梨是歐洲首個澳洲定居點以及罪犯…

locations.summary: Carnarvon Gorge is located in the Southern Brigalow Belt bioregion in Central Queensland (Australia), 593 km northwest…

relations.subject: Australian king parrot
relations.evidence: Found in humid and heavily forested upland regions of the eastern portion of the continent, including eucalyptus wooded areas in and directly adjacent to subtropical and temperate rainforest

relations.subject: Australian king parrot
relations.evidence: Further from their normal eastern upland habitat, they are also found in Canberra during winter, the outer western and northern suburbs of Sydney, and the Carnarvon Gorge in central Queensland
